top_signals.title: South Korea Stock Boom: Why Kospi Is World’s Most Volatile Benchmark Stock Index
top_signals.summary: Investing in South Korea’s stock market has yielded huge returns this year, but it’s been a wild ride. Volatility on the benchmark Kospi Index has topped 60%, almost double that of Japan’s Nikkei 225. It’s even put the notoriously skittish cryptocurrency Bitcoin in the shade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
top_signals.summary: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
